nasb.text: Like a shepherd He will tend His flock, In His arm He will gather the lambs And carry them in His bosom; He will gently lead the nursing ewes.

esv.text: He will tend his flock like a shepherd; he will gather the lambs in his arms; he will carry them in his bosom, and gently lead those that are with young.

cnv.text: 他必像牧人牧養自己的羊群， 像用膀臂聚集羊羔， 抱在自己的懷中， 慢慢引導乳養小羊的。

ccb.text: 祂像牧人一样牧养自己的羊群， 用臂膀把羊羔聚在一起， 抱在怀中， 温柔地引导母羊。

csbs.text: 他必像牧人牧养自己的羊群， 把羊羔聚集在他的膀臂下， 把它们抱在自己的怀中， 又温柔地引领哺乳的母羊。
